Home | All Repos | Community PRs Awaiting Review | Consider Closing | Most Actionable PRs | Quick Wins: Ready to Merge | 💬 Feedback

Most Actionable PRs — dotnet/maui

Updated ~twice daily (weekdays 2x, weekends 1x), last at 2026-03-15 17:47 UTC · 396 PRs · dotnet/maui

All open PRs sorted by Action score. Higher-scored PRs are closer to merge-ready and would benefit most from maintainer attention.

How are the scores calculated?

Each PR has three scores on a 0–10 scale:

Ready — how close to merging?

PointsSignal
3.0No merge conflicts
2.5CI passing
2.5Has approval
2.5Feedback addressed
2.5Discussion healthy
2.0–3.0Small, easy to review (2.0) / trivial ≤2 files, ≤20 lines (3.0)
1.5Has maintainer review
1.0Recently active
0.5–1.0Team or known author (1.0) / community (0.5)
0.7Recently updated
0.5Well labeled
0.3Good review momentum

Need — benefits from maintainer attention?

PointsSignal
1.5No approval yet
1.0Community author
1.0Reviewed, not approved
1.0Has unresolved feedback
1.0High interest
0.5Large change (>200 lines)
0.5Trivial change (≤2 files, ≤20 lines, no unresolved threads)
0.5Old but active (>30d)
−1.5Author silent >14d (ball in their court)
−0.5Author slow 7–14d (ball in their court)

Action — best use of your time?

(ready + 1) × (need + 1)
normalized to 0–10

PRs that are both high-need and near-ready rank highest.

🎯 = action ≥ 5
⚡ = action 4–5

Click any column header to re-sort. See weight calibration analysis for methodology.
